heading: Army and Air National Guard of the United States: mobilization; maintenance of organization
label: 12404 Army and Air National Guard of the United States: mobilization; maintenance of organization
text: During an initial mobilization, the organization of a unit of the Army National Guard of the United States or of the Air National Guard of the United States ordered into active Federal service shall, so far as practicable, be maintained as it existed on the date of the order to duty.
notes: Prior ProvisionsProvisions similar to those in this section were contained in sections 3498 and 8498 of this title, prior to repeal by .Pub. L. 103–337, § 1662(f)(2)
